text:
The D [Dino] Hunter (, Dino Hantā) is the main character featured in the eponymous book narrating the adventures of a Hunter going on many adventures to many unknown places. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 1 

Background

The D Hunter is the main character in a book that an Amateur Hunter Sheila gives to Kurapika and Pairo as thanks for rescuing her in a time of need. 

Plot

Kurapika's Memories

Kurapika and Pairo read about the character's exploits in Dino Hunter and later even the Kurta Clan Elder reads it and is impressed by the character's endeavors. 

It is revealed that Kurapika felt inspired by the D Hunter to want to explore the "Outside World". Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 2 

Trivia

Although D Hunter was never clearly shown, he/she is presumably one of the four characters in a group fighting against some monsters in one of the book's illustrations. 
It is unknown if a Dino Hunter is one of the specializations available to real pro Hunters or if that is merely the character's name; although "dino" may be the shortening of "dinosaur", suggesting a possible Beast Hunter subtype, the hypothetical "Dinosaur Hunter".

References
